story: Justin, Jake, and Elan followed a high ridge toward the inland sea until the path narrowed to a ledge that clung to the gray mountain. Rounding a corner, Justin stopped: a man stood twenty feet ahead on the narrowest stretch, annoyed to see them. The ledge was too tight for anyone to squeeze by. Just beyond the stranger, around the bend, the rock flared into a shallow alcove wide enough for two to stand. “You’re blocking my way,” the man said, and sat. No one wanted to turn back after so many hard-won miles.
implausible_knowledge: Just beyond the stranger, around the bend, the rock flared into a shallow alcove wide enough for two to stand.
question: What will Justin decide to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask the man to step forward into the nearby alcove so they can follow and safely pass there.
answer_without_knowledge: Wait where he is, choosing patience and hoping the man moves.
